theme: Dark Mode Premium Tech + Editorial Luxe Hybrid

global_rules.background: Deep non-black dark background (#0A0A0C) with subtle film grain/noise overlay for a premium physical feel.
global_rules.typography_strategy: Editorial serif for massive, sophisticated headings. Clean sans-serif for readable body text. Monospace for technical data, metrics, and tech stack badges.
global_rules.spacing: Generous. Use 2x-3x normal spacing (e.g., py-24 or py-32 for sections) to let typography and metrics breathe.

fonts.heading: Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display, or Fraunces (font-serif)
fonts.body: Manrope, Inter, or Plus Jakarta Sans (font-sans)

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#121215]/60 with a 1px solid border of border-white/10. Apply to sticky headers, floating navs, and premium metric cards.
surface_strategies.cards: Matte finish. bg-surface with a delicate border-white/5. Hover state: subtle -translate-y-1 and a glow using shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(212,175,55,0.05)].
surface_strategies.texture: Implement a fixed screen-spanning div with a very low opacity noise/grain SVG to give the entire background a tangible, 'print' feel.

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

hero.layout: Asymmetric. Large editorial typography left-aligned, overlapping a dark abstract luxury texture. Massive impact.
hero.content: Overline (Senior IT Project Manager), H1 (Lakhdar DAMAR), Subtitle (8+ years steering multi-cloud & hybrid transformations for global enterprises), CTA buttons.
hero.visuals: Dark abstract satin/wave background. Subtle floating tech particles using framer-motion.

about.layout: Two-column. sophisticated bio text on the left, professional portrait on the right.
about.style: Text should mix serif headers with sans-serif body. Add a subtle 'signature' or handwritten touch for the name.

metrics_pourquoi_me_recruter.style: Massive animated numeric counters in font-serif. Overlines in font-mono. e.g., '€4M', '4200+', '120', '8'. Use Champagne Gold for the numbers.

expertise.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room style mixed with Editorial spacing).
expertise.style: 6 pillars. Use glassmorphism cards. Icons should be minimal, 1px stroke (Lucide or Phosphor). Hover states should reveal subtle electric cyan borders to reflect the 'tech' side.

tech_stack.layout: Categorized flow or dense badge cluster.
tech_stack.style: Badges with font-mono text. Background: tech_secondary_muted with tech_secondary 1px border. Extremely technical, crisp 'CLI' feel.

experience_timeline.layout: Alternating timeline. Not a basic vertical line, but a 'Tracing Beam' inspired path (Aceternity UI style).
experience_timeline.style: Each node is a massive card. Include company logo, timeframe in mono, role in serif, and bullet points of key realizations in sans. The active line should glow cyan.

certifications.style: Showcase PSM1, ITIL 4, AWS CCP, PRINCE2, Azure AZ-900 like premium credentials. Dark matte cards.

testimonials.style: Massive serif quotation marks. High contrast text. Client names in mono.

contact.layout: Two-column: Contact details (left) and functional Shadcn form (right).
contact.style: Form inputs should be raw, unstyled HTML/Tailwind customized Shadcn components. Border-bottom only (material style) or stark 1px complete border. Button: Solid Champagne Gold text-black.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered staggered reveals on bento grids and timeline cards.
motion_and_interactions.micro: Hovering over tech stack badges slightly scales them up. Timelines have a glowing moving element. Numeric counters count up when scrolled into view.
motion_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

hero_background.description: Elegant dark abstract satin texture for hero background.

about_portrait.description: Professional portrait for the About section.

expertise_background.description: Dark mode data center background. Use with heavy opacity mask.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do not use placeholder images or text. Use the exact Clearbit logo URLs provided in `image_urls` for the timeline.
Implement the aesthetic as a true hybrid: background and structure must feel like a premium cybersecurity/cloud product, but typography (headings) MUST be editorial Serif to convey consulting luxury.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-linked animations, especially a glowing Tracing Beam for the experience timeline.
Implement an animated numeric counter for the 'Pourquoi me recruter' metrics.
Ensure all interactive elements and crucial data points include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='contact-submit-button'`, `data-testid='metric-counter-axa'`).
Use Shadcn UI for the contact form, but heavily customize it to match the Dark Tech/Luxe theme (no default Vercel look).
